title: Aspirin (acetylsalicylic acid) bulk — Chapter 29 non-Free MFN
source: CROSS NY 890808 (22 Oct 1993) — Acetylsalicylic acid (Aspirin) bulk → 2918.22.1000, 10.2% ad valorem in the letter; GSP may apply by origin (Hungary cited). Classification path remains Chapter 29 bulk, not 3004. Current HTS Column 1 general for 2918.22.10 is still non-Free (schedule mirrors cite 6.5%) — do not invent a Free bulk rate.

value_note.contrast: Finished aspirin tablets under 3004 Free (NY K87058). Preference can zero the bulk rate — cite base MFN non-Free vs Free finished
